hero.title: Join Our Movement
hero.description: Volunteer with Care4ME and transform lives directly. Your time and expertise matter.

form.heading: Apply to Volunteer
form.successMessage: Thank you! Your application has been received. We'll contact you soon!

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.quote: I've helped 50+ seniors learn about managing chronic diseases. Seeing their confidence grow is the best reward.

items.name: Michael Chen
items.quote: Working with young students on health literacy has changed my perspective on what education truly means.

items.name: Priya Desai
items.quote: Creating health materials that resonate with real communities is fulfilling beyond measure.
